name: harness-skills
description: Project-level Agent Harness scaffolding and closed-loop workflow skills for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Bootstrap project-level Agent Harness workflows for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Harness Skills initializes a controlled project workspace with context, specs, plans, guardrails, run records, local gates, review, verification, and evaluation feedback.
defaultPrompt: Initialize an Agent Harness for this project.
